title: Sammy
html:
Stub. Yahir's younger cousin (mom's side); brother of Dominic.

What we know

  • "Sammy wants to be near his brother. He is coming into his own and experiencing this is fucked" — 2025 06 21 on bubbas.
  • Yahir: "I want to be there for Sammy. My sister wants to be there for Sammy."
  • Wedding-list invitee (2025 06 22 wedding list for now) — listed under mom's family.
